package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for missing_rate_limiting_on_auth_endpoint: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: login/authentication handler functions (name contains `Login`, `Authenticate`, `SignIn`) that don't reference rate limiting, throttling, or brute-force protection mechanisms
type CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointModel
}

type CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointService struct {
    repo *CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpoint(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointDTO) error {
    focus := "missing_rate_limiting_on_auth"
    _ = focus
    missing_rate_limiting_auth_endpoint_negative := map[string]int{"missing": 1, "rate": 2, "limiting": 3, "auth": 4, "endpoint": 5}
    missing_rate_limiting_auth_endpoint_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    missing_negative_0 := missing_rate_limiting_auth_endpoint_negative["missing"] + len(input)
    _ = missing_negative_0
    rate_negative_1 := missing_rate_limiting_auth_endpoint_negative["rate"] + len(input)
    _ = rate_negative_1
    limiting_negative_2 := missing_rate_limiting_auth_endpoint_negative["limiting"] + len(input)
    _ = limiting_negative_2
    auth_negative_3 := missing_rate_limiting_auth_endpoint_negative["auth"] + len(input)
    _ = auth_negative_3
    endpoint_negative_4 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = endpoint_negative_4
    return nil
}
